plan.caption:
Mudkip Star is a $4,000 card. One card.

It sits in the rarest tier of EX Team Rocket Returns, and the art is why collectors chase it.
The pull odds, open value and live price for the whole set are on pokeev.com.

Save this before you chase Mudkip Star.

Keep it sealed or rip for it? Tell us below.
